name: Greenie carryover OFF — IDENTICAL inputs to carryover-on, proving the lever. With carryover OFF the two unclaimed par-3s (H1, H3) EXPIRE instead of rolling, so the 3rd par-3's won greenie (H5) is worth only 1 point, not 3. Flips $15/side -> $5/side.
_contract: Golden HAND-CALC fixture for the F1 greenie modifier (Story 2.2), carryover=false variant. Same count-based rawA rule; the ONLY difference vs greenie-carryover-on.json is the lever: an UNCLAIMED par-3 expires (carryOut 0) instead of rolling (FR40). Proves the carryover boolean is the single greenie lever (FR2). SettlementEdge IR is the post-Story-2.1a whole-dollar 1-to-1 layout. Integer cents; fromPlayerId PAYS toPlayerId.
_handCalc:
Identical inputs to greenie-carryover-on.json; greenie carryover=FALSE. All base points 0 (nets=par). GREENIE FOLD:
  H1 (par 3): boxes none => UNCLAIMED. carryIn 0 -> carryOut 0 (EXPIRES, carryover off). award 0.
  H2 (par 4): skipped.
  H3 (par 3): boxes none => UNCLAIMED. carryIn 0 -> carryOut 0 (EXPIRES). award 0.
  H4 (par 5): skipped.
  H5 (par 3): a1 box => rawA=+1, WON. award = +1 + sign*carryIn = +1 + 0 = +1 to A. carryOut 0.
settleablePar3Count=3, finalCarryPoints=0, pointsByHole={5:+1}.

SETTLE: pts(H5)= +1. Each cross pair += 1*250=250 => each A +500c (+$5), each B -500c. EDGES (1-to-1): b1->a1 500, b2->a2 500. ledgerTotal=1000c.

CONTRAST: identical inputs; carryover flips H5 from +3 -> +1, i.e. $15/side -> $5/side. CONSERVATION: Sum|pts| + finalCarry = 1 + 0 = 1; but RHS over settleable par-3s with carry off is NOT the conservation invariant (that invariant is stated for carryover ON only) — here the two unclaimed greenies are simply discarded by design.
